case_title: MIDLAND FUNFING LLC VS. JACLYN THONGRAK ET AL

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-01-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
Vivian Lerche, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
